title: Mozambique from TF&AL
description: This resource pack replaces crossbow with Mozambique from games Titanfall, Titanfall 2, Apex Legend.
body:
This resource pack replaces crossbow with Mozambique from games Titanfall, Titanfall 2, Apex Legend.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0HJIGop7pLY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You can change emblem (creeper by default), you just need create "emblem.png" and made your own emblem [​way: "assets\minecraft\textures\mozambique "].

On display shows what you loaded in weapon (arrow/firework/nothing).

In inventory/HUD you can see load or empty your weapon.

No Optifine needed. Made with Blockbench.
